description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSYS2 Build that triggers on push and pull request events. Use a Windows job matrix to build with different configurations, including release and debug builds with various options. For each build, check out the code with submodules, set up MSYS2 with CLANG64, install dependencies, and then either use CMake to configure, build, and install, or build a Libretro core. Run tests for default builds.
